note: Fearful, broadly declining tape — realised vol spikes across the universe. The target-vol scalar collapses (est_book_vol >> target) AND the regime multiplier drops to 0.4, so the book DE-RISKS hard into a near-full USDT reserve, keeping only tiny inverse-vol sleeves in the two lowest-vol large-caps plus a heartbeat trade.

computed.regime_reason: breadth_pct 31 <= 40 AND median_24h_return -3.6 < -2 AND fear_greed 22 <= 30 -> risk_off (vol spikes; de-risk)

target_vol.reason: est_book_vol 1.05 far above target 0.45 -> scalar 0.45/1.05 = 0.43 (strong de-risk)

computed.gross_reason: gross = 100 * regime_multiplier 0.4 * target_vol_scalar 0.43 = 17.2; the elevated-vol book is cut to two tiny lowest-vol sleeves, the rest rotates to USDT.

risk_weights.note: dropped — gross too small to seat a meaningful sleeve
highest vol -> smallest sleeve, dropped at this gross

computed.risk_weights_reason: Every realised_vol is elevated (BTCB 0.85 up to CAKE 1.60). inv_vol = 1/vol; raw_parity_weight = inv_vol / Σ inv_vol. The collapsed gross 17.2 only seats the two lowest-vol sleeves (BTCB, ETH); the rest stays in USDT to de-risk.
computed.reserve_reason: Two sleeves at 7 + 5 = 12 deployed; the remaining 88 is the USDT reserve. min_stable_reserve 10% comfortably honoured.

entry: De-risk in risk_off: the target-vol scalar (0.43) and the regime multiplier (0.4) both cut gross; seat only the lowest-vol sleeves tiny.
Hold the bulk of the book in USDT; do not chase — risk is managed by SIZING, not by a directional bet.
Per-name weight capped at 17%; min_stable_reserve floor 10% always honoured.
exit: Scale the whole book down proportionally as est_book_vol rises above target; rotate the cut to USDT.
Trim/exit sleeves whose realised_vol spiked further; exit any name that becomes ineligible.
Re-deploy gross only as realised vol normalises and the target-vol scalar recovers toward 1.0.

actions.reason: risk_off de-risk + realised_vol 1.25 -> sleeve dropped, rotate to USDT
highest realised_vol 1.60 -> dropped at the collapsed gross
smallest compliant daily-trade clip folded into the lowest-vol sleeve; satisfies min_trades_per_day 1 without taking real risk
